title: Breezy
description: A unique approach to hot air balloons!
body:
![Breezy image description](https://imgur.com/UDZLMEm.png)


![BisectHosting affiliate code (codyhuh)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/549ed6c6-79e9-4524-b62d-aaff4e724aa9.webp)

<details>
<summary>Text Description</summary>

 # Breezy

Breezy adds a few new wind related features such as wind particles and hot air balloons!

Wind particles display above ground in various Overworld biomes. They appear most frequently in mountainous regions.

Hot air balloons can be ridden and flown. Players must use flint and steel and sand to ascend and descend respectively. The player can use shears to remove unwanted sandbags.

Another unique characteristic of these balloons is that the player cannot control the direction that they float in. Instead, players must use a Gust Gauge in order to monitor the wind direction. Wind blows in a different direction every day. It also blows in a different direction every 32 vertical blocks. This means you are able to change directions at different altitudes.

### Requires GeckoLib

</details>
